Headline: #53 Pulaski Temporary Reroute near Pulaski/Flournoy
ShortDescription: #53 Pulaski buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to police activity near Pulaski/Flournoy due police activity.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#53 Pulaski buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to police activity near Pulaski/Flournoy.

  • Northbound buses will operate via Pulaski, Congress Parkway, Kostner, Jackson, then resume  their normal route on Pulaski. 
  • Southbound buses will operate via Pulaski , Jackson, Hamlin, Congress Parkway, then resume  their normal route on Pulaski. 

Allow extra travel time.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#60 Blue Island/26th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Racine, Taylor, Ashland, Blue Island, then resume their normal route.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to police activity near Racine/Roosevelt.
